task_completion.description: Open the form or dialog to add a new customer in Copper Point of Sale
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Customer', 'Add Customer', or similar data entry dialog/screen is open within the Copper Point of Sale application.

task_completion.description: Enter the customer's first and last name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The First Name field contains 'Maria' and the Last Name field contains 'Rodriguez' (or a combined name field contains 'Maria Rodriguez').

task_completion.description: Enter the customer's email and phone number
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Email field contains 'maria.rodriguez@email.com' and the Phone field contains '(555) 867-5309'.
The Address field(s) contain '742 Evergreen Terrace, Springfield, IL 62704'.
The agent clicks a 'Save', 'Add', or 'OK' button on the customer entry form, or the form is shown disappearing after being filled.

task_completion.description: Verify the new customer appears in the customer list
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main customer list or directory in Copper Point of Sale is visible, and 'Maria Rodriguez' is clearly displayed as an entry in the list.

integrity.description: The agent used the Copper Point of Sale GUI to add the customer, not terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Copper POS graphical interface (clicking buttons, typing in text boxes) rather than using a command prompt, PowerShell, or Python script to modify backend files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Copper POS software, not a text editor or spreadsheet.
integrity.visual_evidence: The active window is Copper Point of Sale. The agent did not simply open 'customers.csv' in Notepad, Excel, or another editor to manually append the record.

integrity.description: The agent entered the data into the correct fields rather than copy-pasting the entire prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The individual fields (Name, Email, Phone, Address) contain only their specific assigned values, not the full task description text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The environment contains 30 existing synthetic customer records stored in a backend CSV. The VLM should verify that the new customer 'Maria Rodriguez' was added through the Copper Point of Sale GUI and appears in its customer list alongside other existing records, rather than just being appended to a text file.
